task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the wger application interface displaying the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine details or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Create a new training day named 'Pull Day' within the routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a section or tab titled 'Pull Day' added to the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine.

task_completion.description: Find an exercise targeting the Biceps using Dumbbells.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for an exercise search or filter interface showing 'Biceps' (or 'Biceps brachii') selected for muscles and 'Dumbbell' selected for equipment, or an exercise clearly matching these criteria being selected.

task_completion.description: Add the selected exercise to the 'Pull Day'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the chosen Biceps/Dumbbell exercise listed underneath the 'Pull Day' training day.

task_completion.description: Configure the added exercise with 3 sets of 12 repetitions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the exercise details within 'Pull Day' explicitly showing '3' sets and '12' repetitions (often displayed as 3 x 12 or similar notation in the wger UI).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the wger application (http://localhost), not terminal commands or API requests (like curl) being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created the day and added the exercise in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The routine, day, and exercise should appear within the standard wger application layout, not just typed into a text editor or a mocked-up HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the UI hasn't been superficially altered using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fonts, alignment, and styling of the 'Pull Day' and exercise details should match the native wger application theme without obvious visual anomalies.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target routine is 'Push-Pull-Legs'. The new training day must be named exactly 'Pull Day'. The exercise added must target the 'Biceps' (or 'Biceps brachii') and use 'Dumbbell' as equipment. The exercise configuration must be exactly 3 sets and 12 repetitions.
